mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${schema}.prmsn_chg_log ( chnrg_user_id, trgt_user_id, user_menu_authrt_oid, menu_oid, prmsn_type, old_vl, new_vl, chg_type, chg_dt, rsn, reg_dt, reg_id ) VALUES
( #{item.chnrgUserId}, #{item.trgtUserId}, #{item.userMenuAuthrtOid}, #{item.menuOid}, #{item.prmsnType}, #{item.oldVl}, #{item.newVl}, #{item.chgType}, #{item.chgDt}, #{item.rsn}, IFNULL(#{item.regDt}, NOW()), IFNULL(#{item.regId}, #{item.chnrgUserId}) )
